sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41820" key="e)popa/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐποπάζω</orth>, <sense id="n41820.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bestow besides,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεὸς δ᾽ ἐπὶ ὄλβον ὀ.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0219.tlg001:1:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhian.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.9</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> ; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπὶ κλέος ὤπασε Μοῖρα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.521</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
